entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Environmental factors that cause stress to plants

entities.name: ORTHOLOGOUS SEQUENCES
entities.description: Sequences in different species that evolved from a common ancestral gene by speciation

entities.name: STRESS CDNA LIBRARIES
entities.description: Collections of complementary DNA synthesized from mRNA expressed during stress

entities.name: STRESS RELATED GENES
entities.description: Genes that are activated or modified in response to abiotic stress

entities.name: ESTS
entities.description: Expressed Sequence Tags, short sub-sequences of a cDNA sequence

entities.name: CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: A group of grasses cultivated for their edible grains

entities.name: DICOTS
entities.description: Flowering plants with two seed leaves

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: Use of computational tools to analyze biological data

entities.name: CLUSTERING
entities.description: Process of grouping similar sequences together

entities.name: ANNOTATION
entities.description: Process of attaching biological information to sequences

entities.name: COMPARATIVE GENOMICS
entities.description: Comparing genomic features of different organisms

entities.name: MOLECULAR EVOLUTION
entities.description: Change in allele frequencies in a population over time at the molecular level

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism
